svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.0.6 Chrome/138.0.7204.100 Electron/37.2.3 Safari/537.36" version="28.0.6"> <diagram id="otel-fig1" name="図1 意思決定の全体地図"> <mxGraphModel dx="-524" dy="-227" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="620" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="app" value="アプリ + OTel SDK
(計装は経路非依存)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="260" width="180" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="colb" value="経路B
Collector
(CloudWatch Agent /
ADOT / 標準)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="380" y="180" width="180" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="colc" value="経路C
カスタム Collector" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="380" y="340" width="180" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cw" value="Amazon CloudWatch（OTLP エンドポイント / SigV4）" style="points=[[0,0],[0.25,0],[0.5,0],[0.75,0],[1,0],[1,0.25],[1,0.5],[1,0.75],[1,1],[0.75,1],[0.5,1],[0.25,1],[0,1],[0,0.75],[0,0.5],[0,0.25]];outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;container=1;pointerEvents=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_aws_cloud_alt;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#000000;dashed=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="700" y="120" width="260" height="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xray" value="xray
/v1/traces" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0,0],[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0,0],[0,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.75,1,0],[1,1,0],[0,0.25,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.75,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0]];outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#000000;gradientColor=#4D72F3;gradientDirection=north;fillColor=#3334B9;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.x_ray;" parent="cw" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="50" width="48" height="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="logs" value="logs
/v1/logs" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0,0],[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0,0],[0,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.75,1,0],[1,1,0],[0,0.25,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.75,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0]];outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#000000;gradientColor=#F34482;gradientDirection=north;fillColor=#BC1356;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.cloudwatch;" parent="cw" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="160" width="48" height="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mon" value="monitoring
/v1/metrics
(プレビュー)" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0,0],[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0,0],[0,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.75,1,0],[1,1,0],[0,0.25,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.75,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0]];outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#000000;gradientColor=#F34482;gradientDirection=north;fillColor=#BC1356;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.cloudwatch;" parent="cw" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="280" width="48" height="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ea" value="経路A：直接送信 (SigV4)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=11;" parent="1" source="app" target="cw" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eb1" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;" parent="1" source="app" target="colb" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ec1" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;" parent="1" source="app" target="colc" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eb2" value="SigV4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=11;" parent="1" source="colb" target="cw" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ec2" value="traces は SigV4 のみ
logs・metrics は bearer token も可" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=11;" parent="1" source="colc" target="cw" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 180px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
